videos.headline: Indiana takes the lead as Omar Cooper Jr. snags the TD
videos.description: Indiana goes up 7-3 as Omar Cooper Jr. outmuscles his defender for a short touchdown catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana takes the lead as Omar Cooper Jr. snags the TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kurtis Rourke drops a dime while being hit for an Indiana TD
videos.description: Indiana goes up 14-3 as Kurtis Rourke gets the pass off while being hit and it travels 36 yards to Elijah Sarratt for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kurtis Rourke drops a dime while being hit for an Indiana TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michigan's Zeke Berry jumps the pass for an INT
videos.description: Zeke Berry gives Michigan great field position as he jumps in front of the pass for an interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michigan’s Zeke Berry jumps the pass for an INT) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalel Mullings pulls Michigan closer with a TD
videos.description: Kalel Mulling scores on fourth down to pull Michigan within a couple points in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kalel Mullings pulls Michigan closer with a TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET
